title: Claude Code migration plan repo
description: WHY: Annapurna's persistent agent system (memory, session logs, orchestration rules, slash commands) needs to be ported from Pi to Claude Code as a separate shareable repo. Plan exists at ~/sanctuary/Efforts/Claude Code Migration Plan.md. WHAT: Create claude-persistent-agent repo following the migration plan — CLAUDE.md, commands/, memory templates, install.sh, docs. NOT part of dotfiles — standalone repo. WHERE: New repo ~/repos/claude-persistent-agent. HOW: Complex — translate Pi skills/extensions into Claude Code conventions, write install script, test cold start flow.

title: Stow restructure + nvim merge
description: WHY: Current dotfiles use manual symlinks and have a stale Kickstart nvim config while the real config lives on the machine at ~/.config/nvim/. Need to consolidate and make portable. WHAT: 1) Restructure repo for GNU Stow (nvim/.config/nvim/..., ghostty/.config/ghostty/config). 2) Replace Kickstart nvim config with current modular config from ~/.config/nvim/. 3) Fix <leader>e conflict (Oil keeps it, diagnostics moves to <leader>d). 4) Add .stylua.toml. 5) Update install.sh to use stow (cross-platform). 6) Update README. WHERE: Entire repo — new directory structure, all nvim/ files replaced, install.sh rewritten, README rewritten. HOW: Complex — full repo restructure + config merge + conflict resolution. Drop lazygit plugin (not needed). Drop all Kickstart scaffolding (doc/, .github/, LICENSE.md, README.md inside nvim/).
